56707.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56707.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56708.title: Top 50 Classics That Made MTV!
56708.description: Back in the day, MTV was filling our screens with some iconic music videos, which is why we're playing 50 of the best classics that made MTV great!

56709.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
56709.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

56710.title: Forever 80s
56710.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

56711.title: 80s Power Ballad Heaven!
56711.description: We've selected some of the most iconic 80s power ballads ever recorded to play for you right now on MTV 80s!

56712.title: ... So 80s!
56712.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
